subcodes.first_line: Man must cast the reflection of his countenance in the eternal mirror of the celestial realm, upon the page of the Kingdom, for in this world 'Abdu'l-Bahá [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انسان بايد در جهان بالا در آئينه ابدی صفحه ملکوت پرتو شمايل اندازد زيرا عبدالبهاء در اين جهان
subcodes.subjects: @human soul as mirror; divine light, attributes within, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
